slogans.primary: The Strength to Carry Your Hustle
slogans.secondary: The Strength of the Boda Boda

location: Cnr. Busia & Enterprise Road, Industrial Area, Nairobi

support.pdl: No Driving License? We help you get your Provisional Driving License (PDL) from a driving school so you can start working.
support.maintenance: Service every 3,000km or 3 months using Renegade Ignitor SJ 10W40 oil to protect your 12,000km warranty.
support.breakIn: During the first 1,000km, keep speed under 65km/h and avoid too much full throttle.
